creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=fd0b4ac035e7072949ad93e008eebd27c312082f

commit fd0b4ac035e7072949ad93e008eebd27c312082f
Author:     Jason E. Hale <jhale@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2024-06-14 04:53:00 +0000
Commit:     Jason E. Hale <jhale@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-06-14 05:29:26 +0000

    */*: Mark audio/py-tagpy and consumer as BROKEN

    audio/py-tagpy is an abandoned wrapper to audio/taglib and is not
    compatible with TagLib 2.x. Singular potential consumer audio/sonata is
    also abandoned software, but the TAGLIB option is non-default.

    PR:             276677

 audio/py-tagpy/Makefile | 2 ++
 audio/sonata/Makefile   | 1 +
 2 files changed, 3 insertions(+)
